data.body: e51b completion-verifier caught a 2nd real gap: AC required 'forced reader error -> no drops' testing the reader RAISING (not just None). Added test_forced_reader_exception_yields_no_drops. Rebuilt (branch epic/374d-rebuild3): c3e4/c639/3bff UNCHANGED (474/475/476 keep votes+closures); e51b 9f034701b, de8a 2feeae957 rebuilt w/ Change-Ids+signoff. Re-pushed 477/478 (re-voting). 3 children closed (c3e4/c639/3bff). Then close e51b/de8a, epic, submit.
